'''tachapa''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:uzaron|uzaron]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''male''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| t-ch-p
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:uzaron|uzaron]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| male
|-
! Citation form
| tachapa
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:tæchæpæth|tæchæpæth]] || [[word:tæchæpæj|tæchæpæj]] || [[word:tæchæpæsh|tæchæpæsh]] || [[word:tæchæpæ|tæchæpæ]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:tachachapath|tachachapath]] || [[word:tachachapaj|tachachapaj]] || [[word:tachachapash|tachachapash]] || [[word:tachachapa|tachachapa]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:tachapath|tachapath]] || [[word:tachapaj|tachapaj]] || [[word:tachapash|tachapash]] || [[word:tachapa|tachapa]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:tachafpath|tachafpath]] || [[word:tachafpaj|tachafpaj]] || [[word:tachafpash|tachafpash]] || [[word:tachafpaf|tachafpaf]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for male singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:tachapatha|tachapatha]] || [[word:tachapaja|tachapaja]] || [[word:tachapasha|tachapasha]] || [[word:tachapaka|tachapaka]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:tachapath|tachapath]] || [[word:tachapaj|tachapaj]] || [[word:tachapash|tachapash]] || [[word:tachapa|tachapa]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:tachapathal|tachapathal]] || [[word:tachapajal|tachapajal]] || [[word:tachapashal|tachapashal]] || [[word:tachapakal|tachapakal]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:tachapathatha|tachapathatha]] || [[word:tachapajaja|tachapajaja]] || [[word:tachapashasha|tachapashasha]] || [[word:tachapaka|tachapaka]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:tachapathan|tachapathan]] || [[word:tachapajan|tachapajan]] || [[word:tachapashan|tachapashan]] || [[word:tachapakan|tachapakan]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:tachapathaoro|tachapathaoro]] || [[word:tachapajaoro|tachapajaoro]] || [[word:tachapashaoro|tachapashaoro]] || [[word:tachapakaoro|tachapakaoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki male nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|d0c3b9f}}
